title: GBPUAT Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Junior Research Fellow Posts
description: The Gobind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology (GBPUAT) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Junior Research Fellow Jobs. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech, M.E./M. Tech and M.Sc. can apply for the GBPUAT Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have mentioned the educa...
